issue.title: Document Haxe module class function complexity comment rule

artifacts.role: root agent directive requiring documented Haxe modules/classes and function docs past a complexity threshold
durable operating guidance for Haxe documentation scope, thresholds, and noise avoidance
program governance ledger updated through WPHX-000.06

validation_result.module_class_rule: Document every Haxe module and class with a short role, ownership-boundary, or emitted-target contract comment.
validation_result.function_threshold_rule: Document functions once non-obvious branch policy, parity invariants, side effects, target assumptions, generated ABI implications, or rediscovery risk make the behavior complex enough to need explanation.
validation_result.noise_rule: Tiny self-evident helpers do not need comment noise.
